title: Cloud VPS + Per-User Docker Container Infrastructure
summary: Provision cloud VPS (Ubuntu 22, Docker) to host the shared brain container plus per-user containers. Each user runs in a fully isolated Docker container with account agents, IBKR Gateway connection, and encrypted credentials. docker-compose handles orchestration. VPS setup is a prerequisite for all MA2+ multi-user deployment.
approach: Decide cloud provider (DigitalOcean, Hetzner, or AWS — open question). Provision Ubuntu 22 VPS with 8+ vCPUs. Install Docker, Docker Compose, nginx (reverse proxy). Set up IBKR Gateway headless container using IBC automation. Configure ufw firewall: allow 443 (dashboard), 8765 (WebSocket), block all else. Deploy Decifer brain container. Write a deploy.sh bootstrap script so the whole setup is reproducible.
